title: Kartr PvP
description: Purple themed Ressourcepack I made for my friend
body:
# 📦 Kartr PvP

**Kartr PvP** is a purple themed **PvP & SMP Overlay texture pack** made for **smooth gameplay**, **clear visuals**, and **competitive fights**.  
Built for **Minecraft 1.21+**, it combines **purple** and **modern style** to give every hit and combo the perfect look. 
This pack is intended to be used together with other texture packs.
It does **not** include features like low fire, low shield, or other PvP tweaks - it mainly changes the GUI and selected blocks to enhance the overall look without affecting gameplay.

## 📋 Full Feature List and Credits


<details>
<summary>Features & Credits</summary>

## Features

- purple hearts
- purple armor bars
- choros fruit hunger bars
- apple skin compability
- purple xp bar
- purple xp number
- transparent offhand

## Credits

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net

Original Hotbar: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aaircrafters-blue-ui

</details>



### Author

Made with 🧡 by [raelmc](https://modrinth.com/user/raelmc)
